title: K-200 Systems Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Systems Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-430-D. Revision: D. Type: manual. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2023-05-07. Last modified: 2024-01-26. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1017, P-1137, P-1102.
